name: Ogden Nightstand Dark Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Finish off the look of your space with the Ogden Nightstand from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This nightstand comes in a natural shade with a woodgrain finish for an amazing look. Crafted from wood, this brown nightstand comes with an open shelf and a built-in drawer to help provide ample space for your headphones, charger, books, lamp and more.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
